creator: skreuzer@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Sent an email to Michael Rendell who is the author of the software and 
he didn't recall such a problem being reported/fixed in the past.  Both 
him and I have been unable to duplicate this issue so I am going to go 
ahead and close this PR. 

If you are still having an issue maybe attach gdb to the parent shell 
and send a stack trace. 

Thanks
